title: Daniel Grundy T/A DG Skips
body: "The Traffic Commissioner made orders to:   revoke the operator licence held by Daniel Grundy T/A DG Skips with effect from 00:01 on 17 August 2020 disqualify Daniel Grundy for a period of 3 years, from 17 August 2020, from acting as transport manager on any operator’s licence   The decision was made on 15 July 2020. "

taxons.title: Transport businesses and vehicle operator licences
